prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance ranking questions.

For each question, given an anchor object, rank all other listed objects by their 3D distance
from the anchor, from nearest to farthest. Answer with a JSON list of object IDs in order.
If two objects appear at very similar distances, give your best estimate — close pairs are scored with tolerance.

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a list of object ID strings).

Example:
[{"qid": "fdr_0001", "answer": ["obj_2", "obj_1", "obj_3"]}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large green rubber cube
  - obj_1: small gray metal cylinder
  - obj_2: large red metal sphere
  - obj_3: large brown rubber cylinder

Questions:
[fdr_0001] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_0, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_1, obj_2, obj_3. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0002] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_1, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_2, obj_3. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0003] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_2, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_1, obj_3. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.
[fdr_0004] Rank all other objects by distance from obj_3, nearest to farthest. Objects to rank: obj_0, obj_1, obj_2. Answer: ordered JSON list of object IDs.

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D positions of the objects in the image and rank them by distance from each anchor object.

From the image, I can see:
- obj_0 (large green rubber cube): positioned at the back-left area
- obj_1 (small gray metal cylinder): positioned in the middle area
- obj_2 (large red metal sphere): positioned in the front-right area
- obj_3 (large brown rubber cylinder): positioned at the left side, in front of the green cube

Let me estimate the 3D positions:
- obj_3 (brown cylinder): left side, middle depth
- obj_0 (green cube): back-left area
- obj_1 (gray cylinder): middle area
- obj_2 (red sphere): front-right area

Distances between objects:
- From obj_0 (green cube, back-left):
  - to obj_3 (brown cylinder, left-middle): relatively close
  - to obj_1 (gray cylinder, middle): moderate distance
  - to obj_2 (red sphere, front-right): farthest

- From obj_1 (gray cylinder, middle):
  - to obj_3 (brown cylinder): close (both in similar area)
  - to obj_0 (green cube): moderate
  - to obj_2 (red sphere): moderate-far

- From obj_2 (red sphere, front-right):
  - to obj_1 (gray cylinder): relatively close
  - to obj_3 (brown cylinder): moderate
  - to obj_0 (green cube): farthest

- From obj_3 (brown cylinder, left-middle):
  - to obj_1 (gray cylinder): close
  - to obj_0 (green cube): moderate
  - to obj_2 (red sphere): farthest

[{"qid": "fdr_0001", "answer": ["obj_3", "obj_1", "obj_2"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0002", "answer": ["obj_3", "obj_0", "obj_2"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0003", "answer": ["obj_1", "obj_3", "obj_0"]}, {"qid": "fdr_0004", "answer": ["obj_1", "obj_0", "obj_2"]}]
